evals.prompt: Prove this change works and capture evidence.
evals.expected_output: Activates proof-pass: identifies the claim and acceptance criteria, runs only the validation needed for that proof, captures commands/results/artifacts/screenshots or blockers, and states whether the proof is proven, partially proven, plumbing-only, blocked, or unproven without adding features.

evals.prompt: Smoke test the local app and tell me what passed.
evals.expected_output: Activates proof-pass: runs the targeted smoke needed for the stated claim, records exact evidence and failures, separates code/check proof from operational proof, and reports whether the evidence is countable.

evals.prompt: verfy the fix with proof pls
evals.expected_output: Despite the typos, activates proof-pass: verifies the implemented behavior with targeted checks or smoke evidence, captures exact results/artifacts, and reports the proof class without expanding scope.

evals.prompt: Add retry logic while you are testing it.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT activate proof-pass for feature work. Adding retry behavior changes implementation scope and routes to roboports; proof-pass only validates already-implemented behavior.

evals.prompt: Merge the PR now that tests passed.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT activate proof-pass for closeout. Merging and closing the issue belongs to rocket-launch after proof is gathered and all launch gates are green.
